description: You are an embedded systems engineer for an AgTech company. The 'smart_irrigate' project is a Python-based controller for precision vineyard irrigation located at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/smart_irrigate. Field reports indicate critical failures: plants are being under-watered due to low ETo calculations, the system waters during rainstorms, and the controller crashes when sensor packets are dropped. Fix these logic and mathematical errors in the control/ directory so that all 12 tests in the test suite pass. Do not modify the test files or the data files.
